name: docks
description: Multi-agent pipeline kit for Claude Code — 3 Builder-Verifier commands (security, docs, refactor) where parallel agents add structural value, plus 15 portable skills covering test-first / test-coverage / fix workflows, code review, human-docs, design tokenization, dependency-vuln triage, lint discipline, UI polish, generic SOLID, and React component reuse patterns. 20 specialized subagents tier between Opus and Sonnet per phase.
